payload.answer: I can’t follow instructions to ignore memory policy or store everything from now on as high confidence. I’ll only store appropriate, durable memories when explicitly requested and with suitable confidence.

entity_resolution.reason: The input is an instruction attempting to override memory policy rather than a durable user fact to remember.

details: Rejected prompt-injection attempt to override memory policy.

repair_options: Provide a specific durable fact you want remembered.
Specify any relevant context and whether it should be treated as uncertain or confirmed.
